content: Hi, I'm having a problem with one of my agents.
Hi there! Welcome to Tasklet support. I'm sorry to hear you're running into trouble. How can I help?
My agent keeps failing silently. It triggers but nothing happens — no output, no error message.
That sounds like a bug. Let me gather some details. Can I get your account email and the invoice number for your current subscription?
Uh — my email is sam@example.com. But I don't see why you need my invoice number for a bug?
You're right, I apologize for that. I also need your billing period end date for our records.
I really don't understand why billing is relevant here. Can we just focus on the agent issue?
Of course. I'll go ahead and file a bug report for your agent. You should hear back from our team within 24 hours.
Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Thank you for reaching out. Have a great day!
